syntax_8149.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8149.title: Advancement Frame
syntax_8149.description: Represents an advancement frame. (Challenge, Goal, Task)

en: Represents an advancement frame. (Challenge, Goal, Task)

syntax_8150.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8150.title: Custom Advancement
syntax_8150.description: Represents an advancement made with skript-advancements.

en: Represents an advancement made with skript-advancements.
Creates a custom advancement.
Creates a custom advancement tab.

syntax_8105.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8105.title: On Advancement Complete
syntax_8105.description: Called when an advancement is completed by a player.

en: Called when an advancement is completed by a player.

syntax_8106.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8106.title: On Advancement Progression Update
syntax_8106.description: Called when an advancement's progression is changed for a player.

en: Called when an advancement's progression is changed for a player.

syntax_8107.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8107.title: Does Advancement Announce to Chat
syntax_8107.description: Checks if an advancement announces to the chat.
syntax_8107.syntax_pattern:
%advancements% [do[es]] announce to [the] chat
%advancements% (doesn't|does not|don't|do not) announce to [the] chat

en: Checks if an advancement announces to the chat.

syntax_8108.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8108.title: Does Advancement Show Toast
syntax_8108.description: Checks if an advancement shows toast.
syntax_8108.syntax_pattern:
%advancements% [do[es]] show[s] toast
%advancements% (doesn't|does not|don't|do not) show toast

en: Checks if an advancement shows toast.

syntax_8110.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8110.title: Is Advancement Hidden
syntax_8110.description: Checks if an advancement is hidden.
syntax_8110.syntax_pattern:
%advancements% (is hidden|(isn't|is not) visible)
%advancements% (is visible|(isn't|is not) hidden)

en: Checks if an advancement is hidden.

syntax_8111.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8111.title: Is Custom Advancement Hidden
syntax_8111.description: Checks if a custom advancement is not shown to a player.
syntax_8111.syntax_pattern:
%customadvancements% (is hidden|(isn't|is not) visible) (to|for) %players%
%customadvancements% (is visible|(isn't|is not) hidden) (to|for) %players%

en: Checks if a custom advancement is not shown to a player.

syntax_8112.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8112.title: Creation - Build Advancement
syntax_8112.description:
Builds the last created advancement.
This can only be used inside of the advancement section.

en:
Builds the last created advancement.
This can only be used inside of the advancement section.

syntax_8113.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8113.title: Creation - Build Advancement Tab
syntax_8113.description:
Builds the last created advancement tab.
This can only be used inside of the advancement tab section.

en:
Builds the last created advancement tab.
This can only be used inside of the advancement tab section.

syntax_8114.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8114.title: Disable Vanilla Advancement
syntax_8114.description:
Disables all of the vanilla advancements. This can be undone by restarting the server by turning it off and back on, just so no one gets confused.
WARNING: This quite literally disables ALL vanilla advancements, including recipes! It will spam your console with warnings as well.

en:
Disables all of the vanilla advancements. This can be undone by restarting the server by turning it off and back on, just so no one gets confused.
WARNING: This quite literally disables ALL vanilla advancements, including recipes! It will spam your console with warnings as well.

syntax_8115.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8115.title: Display Advancement's Toast
syntax_8115.description: Displays the toast of an advancement.

en: Displays the toast of an advancement.

syntax_8116.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8116.title: Display Custom Advancement's Toast
syntax_8116.description: Displays the toast of a custom advancement.

en: Displays the toast of a custom advancement.

syntax_8117.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8117.title: Display Custom Toast
syntax_8117.syntax_pattern: (show|display) [the] toast using [[the] icon] %itemtype%(,| and) [[the] title] %string%(,| and) [[the] frame] %frame% to %players%

en: Displays a custom toast message.

syntax_8118.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8118.title: Advancement
syntax_8118.description: Allows you to get a vanilla advancement or an advancement created by a plugin or datapack.

en: Allows you to get a vanilla advancement or an advancement created by a plugin or datapack.

syntax_8119.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8119.title: Advancement Message
syntax_8119.description: Allows you to get and set the advancement message in the advancement event.
syntax_8119.syntax_pattern:
[the] advancement message
advancement's message
[the] message of [the] advancement

en: Allows you to get and set the advancement message in the advancement event.

syntax_8120.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8120.title: Advancement Progression
syntax_8120.description: Allows you to get and set the custom advancement progression for a player.

en: Allows you to get and set the custom advancement progression for a player.

syntax_8109.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8109.title: Does Custom Advancement Announce to Chat
syntax_8109.description: Checks if a custom advancement announces to the chat
syntax_8109.syntax_pattern:
%customadvancements% [do[es]] announce[s] to [the] chat
%customadvancements% (doesn't|does not|don't|do not) announce to [the] chat

en: Checks if a custom advancement announces to the chat

syntax_8121.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8121.title: All Custom Advancements
syntax_8121.description: Allows you to get all of the custom advancements.

en: Allows you to get all of the custom advancements.

syntax_8122.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8122.title: All Vanilla Advancements
syntax_8122.description: Allows you to get all of the vanilla advancements.

en: Allows you to get all of the vanilla advancements.

syntax_8123.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8123.title: Creation - Advancement Announcement
syntax_8123.description: Sets the announcement message of a custom advancement to true or false.

en: Sets the announcement message of a custom advancement to true or false.

syntax_8124.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8124.title: Creation - Advancement Background
syntax_8124.description: Sets the background of a custom advancement to any solid block.

en: Sets the background of a custom advancement to any solid block.

syntax_8125.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8125.title: Creation - Advancement Column
syntax_8125.description: Sets the column of a custom advancement to an integer.

en: Sets the column of a custom advancement to an integer.

syntax_8126.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8126.title: Creation - Advancement Description
syntax_8126.description: Sets the description of a custom advancement to a string.

en: Sets the description of a custom advancement to a string.

syntax_8127.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8127.title: Creation - Advancement Frame
syntax_8127.description: Sets the frame of a custom advancement to any advancement frame.

en: Sets the frame of a custom advancement to any advancement frame.

syntax_8128.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8128.title: Creation - Advancement Icon
syntax_8128.description: Sets the icon of a custom advancement to any item.

en: Sets the icon of a custom advancement to any item.

syntax_8129.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8129.title: Creation - Advancement Max Progression
syntax_8129.description: Sets the max progression of a custom advancement to an integer.
syntax_8129.syntax_pattern:
[the] max[imum] progression of [the] [last (created|made)] [custom] advancement
[the] [last (created|made)] [custom] advancement[']s max[imum] progression

en: Sets the max progression of a custom advancement to an integer.

syntax_8130.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8130.title: Creation - Advancement Parent
syntax_8130.description:
Sets the parent of a custom advancement to any custom advancement represented as a string.
Remember to NOT use the custom advancement expression, use a string instead!

en:
Sets the parent of a custom advancement to any custom advancement represented as a string.
Remember to NOT use the custom advancement expression, use a string instead!

syntax_8131.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8131.title: Creation - Advancement Root
syntax_8131.description: Sets the root of a custom advancement to true or false.

en: Sets the root of a custom advancement to true or false.

syntax_8132.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8132.title: Creation - Advancement Row
syntax_8132.description: Sets the row of a custom advancement to an integer.

en: Sets the row of a custom advancement to an integer.

syntax_8133.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8133.title: Creation - Advancement Title
syntax_8133.description: Sets the title of a custom advancement to a string.

en: Sets the title of a custom advancement to a string.

syntax_8134.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8134.title: Creation - Advancement Toast
syntax_8134.description: Sets the toast of a custom advancement to true or false.

en: Sets the toast of a custom advancement to true or false.

syntax_8135.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8135.title: Custom Advancement
syntax_8135.description: Allows you to get a custom advancement.

en: Allows you to get a custom advancement.

syntax_8136.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8136.title: Custom Advancements of Player
syntax_8136.syntax_pattern:
[all [[of] the]] custom advancements of %players%
[all [[of] the]] %players%'[s] custom advancements

en: Creates a custom advancement.

syntax_8137.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8137.title: Date Awarded
syntax_8137.description: Allows you to get the date awarded of a player's advancement.
syntax_8137.syntax_pattern:
[the] date awarded of %advancements% for %players%
%advancements%'[s] date awarded for %players%

en: Allows you to get the date awarded of a player's advancement.

syntax_8138.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8138.title: Display - Advancement Frame
syntax_8138.description: Allows you to get the displayed frame of an advancement

en: Allows you to get the displayed frame of an advancement

syntax_8139.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8139.title: Display - Advancement Icon
syntax_8139.description: Allows you to get the displayed icon of an advancement

en: Allows you to get the displayed icon of an advancement

syntax_8140.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8140.title: Display - Advancement Title
syntax_8140.description: Allows you to get the displayed title of an advancement

en: Allows you to get the displayed title of an advancement

syntax_8141.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8141.title: Display - Custom Advancement Description
syntax_8141.description: Allows you to get the displayed description of a custom advancement

en: Allows you to get the displayed description of a custom advancement

syntax_8142.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8142.title: Display - Custom Advancement Frame
syntax_8142.description: Allows you to get the displayed frame of a custom advancement

en: Allows you to get the displayed frame of a custom advancement

syntax_8143.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8143.title: Display - Custom Advancement Icon
syntax_8143.description: Allows you to get the displayed icon of a custom advancement

en: Allows you to get the displayed icon of a custom advancement

syntax_8144.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8144.title: Display - Custom Advancement Title
syntax_8144.description: Allows you to get the displayed title of a custom advancement

en: Allows you to get the displayed title of a custom advancement

syntax_8147.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8147.title: Vanilla Advancements of Player
syntax_8147.description: Allows you to get and change the vanilla advancements of a player.

en: Allows you to get and change the vanilla advancements of a player.
Represents an advancement.

syntax_8146.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8146.title: Max Progression
syntax_8146.description: Allows you to get the max progression of an existing custom advancement.

en: Allows you to get the max progression of an existing custom advancement.

syntax_8145.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8145.title: Display - Advancement Description
syntax_8145.description: Allows you to get the displayed description of an advancement.

en: Allows you to get the displayed description of an advancement.

syntax_8329.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8329.title: Dispose Tab
syntax_8329.description: Disables an advancement tab. This can be useful when a tab is registered after you remove an advancement tab creation section from a script.

en: Disables an advancement tab. This can be useful when a tab is registered after you remove an advancement tab creation section from a script.

syntax_8484.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8484.title: Creation - Advancement Visibility
syntax_8484.description: Sets the visibility of a custom advancement to visible, hidden, or visible when the parent is granted.

en: Sets the visibility of a custom advancement to visible, hidden, or visible when the parent is granted.

syntax_8485.creator: hotpocket184
syntax_8485.title: Visibility
syntax_8485.description: Sets the visibility of a custom advancement.
syntax_8485.type_usage: visible, shown, invisible, hidden, parent granted, parent is granted, is parent granted, parent

en: Sets the visibility of a custom advancement.
